name: Hot and Sweet Sausage Sandwiches with Grilled Peppers, Onions And
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces hot and sweet pork sausage, 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal grill, allow it to burn down to embers.
2. Slice sandwich rolls in half and hollow out.
3. Grill the rolls on each side for just long enough to get grill marks; reserve.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine sliced peppers and onions. Toss lightly with olive oil and season to taste with salt and pepper. Grill for 5 minutes or until done.
5. Slice sausages lengthwise and grill for 3 minutes on each side or until done.
6. Spread Horseradish Mustard on the rolls and top with sausages, grilled onions, and peppers.
